apps/cli/src/commands/db.ts::value:valid.doc: * Validates that a path is safe

apps/cli/src/commands/media.ts::value:va.name: validateDimension
apps/cli/src/commands/media.ts::value:va.doc: * Validates that a string is a valid CSS-like dimension for iTerm2

apps/cli/src/commands/media.ts::value:re.name: resolveDownloadPath
apps/cli/src/commands/media.ts::value:re.doc: * Safely resolves a download path to prevent traversal

apps/cli/src/commands/media.ts::value:ge.name: getExtensionFromMime
apps/cli/src/commands/media.ts::value:ge.doc: * Gets the file extension for a mime type

apps/cli/src/commands/media.ts::value:en.name: ensureExtension
apps/cli/src/commands/media.ts::value:en.doc: * Ensures the filename has an appropriate extension based on Content-Type

apps/server/src/infrastructure/api-clien.name: getORPCClient
apps/server/src/infrastructure/api-clien.doc:
* oRPC クライアントの生成
 * サーバーサイドではルーターを直接呼び出し、クライアントサイドでは /api/rpc を介して fetch を行う

apps/server/src/infrastructure/db/index..name: initializeDb
apps/server/src/infrastructure/db/index..doc:
* Initializes and returns the Drizzle ORM database instance.
 * This function ensures that the database connection is established only once.
 * It reads database connection details from environment variables.
 * @returns {NodePostgresDb | PgLiteDb} The initialized Drizzle ORM database instance.
 * @throws {Error} If required database environment variables are not set.

apps/server/src/infrastructure/jobs/file.name: handleFileAdded
apps/server/src/infrastructure/jobs/file.doc:
* Handles file addition events from the file system watcher.
 * Uses MediaProcessingService for unified registration and job queuing.

apps/server/src/infrastructure/jobs/file.name: handleFileDeleted
apps/server/src/infrastructure/jobs/file.doc:
* Handles file deletion events from the file system watcher.
 * Removes the media from the database and deletes the thumbnail.

apps/server/src/infrastructure/jobs/file.name: handleFileChanged
apps/server/src/infrastructure/jobs/file.doc:
* Handles file change events from the file system watcher.
 * Updates the media metadata and queues reprocessing.

apps/server/src/infrastructure/jobs/thum.name: getStorageConfig
apps/server/src/infrastructure/jobs/thum.doc: * Gets storage config with safe fallback for tests or when ConfigService is not registered

apps/server/src/infrastructure/jobs/thum.name: ensureCacheDir
apps/server/src/infrastructure/jobs/thum.doc:
* Ensures that the thumbnail cache directory for a specific source exists.
 * If the directory does not exist, it will be created recursively.
 * @param {string} mediaSourceId - The ID of the media source.
 * @returns {Promise<void>} A promise that resolves when the directory is ensured.

apps/server/src/routes/about.tsx::value:.name: About
apps/server/src/routes/about.tsx::value:.doc:
* The About page component.
 * Displays information about the application and includes a counter component.
 * @returns {JSX.Element} The rendered About page.

apps/server/src/routes/index.tsx::value:.name: Home
apps/server/src/routes/index.tsx::value:.doc:
* The Home page component.
 * Displays a welcome message and includes a counter component.
 * @returns {JSX.Element} The rendered Home page.

apps/server/src/routes/$.tsx::value:NotF.name: NotFound
apps/server/src/routes/$.tsx::value:NotF.doc:
* A 404 Not Found page component.
 * Displays a message indicating the page was not found and provides links to the home and about pages.
 * @returns {JSX.Element} The rendered 404 page.

edges.name: validatePath
edges.doc: * Validates that a path is safe

edges.name: validateDimension
edges.doc: * Validates that a string is a valid CSS-like dimension for iTerm2

edges.name: resolveDownloadPath
edges.doc: * Safely resolves a download path to prevent traversal

edges.name: getExtensionFromMime
edges.doc: * Gets the file extension for a mime type

edges.name: ensureExtension
edges.doc: * Ensures the filename has an appropriate extension based on Content-Type

edges.name: getErrorMessage
edges.doc: * Safely extract error message from unknown error object

edges.name: globalOptions
edges.doc: * Shared global options for commands

edges.name: AnalyticsService
edges.doc: * Provides services for statistics and analytics related to media.

edges.name: BulkOperationService
edges.doc: * Provides services for performing bulk operations on media files.

edges.name: CollectionService
edges.doc: * Provides services for managing media collections.

edges.name: DataMigrationService
edges.doc: * Provides services for data migration and synchronization functionalities.

edges.name: DirectoryService
edges.doc: * Provides services for managing directories within media sources.

edges.name: FilterPresetService
edges.doc: * Provides services for managing filter presets.

edges.name: IntegrationService
edges.doc: * Provides services for external integrations, such as with ComfyUI and Discord.

edges.name: IpService
edges.doc: * Provides services for managing Intellectual Properties (IPs).

edges.name: ProjectService
edges.doc: * Provides services for managing projects.

edges.name: WorkflowService
edges.doc: * Provides services for managing workflows and automation tasks.

edges.name: HashUtils
edges.doc: * Provides utility functions for generating various types of hashes for media files.

edges.name: Counter
edges.doc:
* A simple counter component that displays a button to increment a count.
 * @returns {JSX.Element} The rendered counter button.

edges.name: Nav
edges.doc:
* Navigation component that displays a list of links and highlights the active link based on the current route.
 * Implements a "scroll-aware" behavior where the header hides on scroll down and reappears on scroll up.
 * @returns {JSX.Element} The rendered navigation bar.

edges.name: SimpleModal
edges.doc:
* A simple modal component that can be opened and closed.
 * It demonstrates basic modal functionality with a button to open it.
 * @returns {JSX.Element} The rendered modal component and its trigger button.

edges.name: appRouter
edges.doc:
* API Router Definition
 * フロントエンドとバックエンドで共有される型定義

edges.name: startDownloadJobs
edges.doc:
* Starts a download job
 * @param mediaSourceId - The ID of the media source
 * @param items - The items to download
 * @returns The response from the download API

edges.name: fetchFromUrl
edges.doc:
* Fetches a file from an external URL via the backend proxy
 * @param url - The external URL to fetch from
 * @returns Blob containing the fetched file

edges.name: getORPCClient
edges.doc:
* oRPC クライアントの生成
 * サーバーサイドではルーターを直接呼び出し、クライアントサイドでは /api/rpc を介して fetch を行う

edges.name: searchMedia
edges.doc:
* Searches media in a specific source
 * @param sourceId - Media source ID
 * @param params - Search parameters
 * @returns Search results with media array and total count

edges.name: ApiError
edges.doc: * Custom error class for API errors

edges.name: buildUrl
edges.doc:
* Builds the full URL for API requests, handling SSR scenarios
 * @param path - The API path (e.g., "/api/sources")
 * @returns The full URL for the request

edges.name: apiRequest
edges.doc:
* Makes an API request with Zod schema validation
 * @param path - The API path
 * @param schema - The Zod schema to validate the response
 * @param options - Fetch options
 * @returns The validated response data

edges.name: apiBlobRequest
edges.doc:
* Makes an API request that returns a Blob (e.g., for file downloads)
 * @param path - The API path
 * @param options - Fetch options
 * @returns The response as a Blob

edges.name: apiSuccessResponseSchema
edges.doc: * Standard API success response

edges.name: fetchMediaSources
edges.doc:
* Fetches all media sources
 * @returns Array of media sources

edges.name: fetchMediaSource
edges.doc:
* Fetches a single media source by ID
 * @param id - Media source ID
 * @returns Media source

edges.name: startThumbnailGeneration
edges.doc:
* Starts thumbnail generation for a media source
 * @param mediaSourceId - The ID of the media source

edges.name: clearThumbnailCache
edges.doc:
* Clears thumbnail cache for a media source
 * @param mediaSourceId - The ID of the media source

edges.name: downloadsRouter
edges.doc: * Downloads Router Implementation

edges.name: ipsRouter
edges.doc: * IPs Router Implementation

edges.name: thumbnailsRouter
edges.doc: * Thumbnails Router Implementation

edges.name: utilsRouter
edges.doc:
* Utils Router Implementation
 * Handles utility-like functions: fetchUrl, AI tagging, etc.

edges.name: initServices
edges.doc:
* Initializes all services and repositories.
 * This should be called early in the server-side lifecycle (including SSR).

edges.name: startBackgroundWorker
edges.doc:
* Starts background worker and maintenance tasks.
 * This should only be called once in the main server process, never during SSR request processing.

edges.name: bootstrap
edges.doc:
* Main bootstrap function for backward compatibility.
 * In TanStack Start SSR, avoid calling this and call initServices instead.

edges.name: NotFoundError
edges.doc:
* Custom error class for when a requested resource is not found in the database.
 * @property {string} _tag - A unique identifier for the error type.
 * @property {unknown} [details] - Optional additional details about the not found error.

edges.name: UnknownDbError
edges.doc:
* Custom error class for generic or unknown database errors.
 * @property {string} _tag - A unique identifier for the error type.
 * @property {unknown} [details] - Optional additional details about the unknown database error.

edges.name: TransactionClient
edges.doc:
* Type representing either a database instance or a transaction client.
 * In Drizzle, both share the same common interface for queries.

edges.name: initializeDb
edges.doc:
* Initializes and returns the Drizzle ORM database instance.
 * This function ensures that the database connection is established only once.
 * It reads database connection details from environment variables.
 * @returns {NodePostgresDb | PgLiteDb} The initialized Drizzle ORM database instance.
 * @throws {Error} If required database environment variables are not set.

edges.name: db
edges.doc:
* A proxy object for the Drizzle ORM database instance.
 * It ensures that the database is initialized lazily upon first access.

edges.name: handleFileAdded
edges.doc:
* Handles file addition events from the file system watcher.
 * Uses MediaProcessingService for unified registration and job queuing.

edges.name: handleFileDeleted
edges.doc:
* Handles file deletion events from the file system watcher.
 * Removes the media from the database and deletes the thumbnail.

edges.name: handleFileChanged
edges.doc:
* Handles file change events from the file system watcher.
 * Updates the media metadata and queues reprocessing.

edges.name: startMonitoring
edges.doc: * Starts file system monitoring for a media source.

edges.name: stopMonitoring
edges.doc: * Stops file system monitoring for a media source.

edges.name: startMonitoringAll
edges.doc: * Starts monitoring for all local media sources.

edges.name: JobQueue
edges.doc: * Manages a queue of background jobs, such as thumbnail generation.

edges.name: extractTags
edges.doc:
* Extracts tags from a media file and saves them to the database.
 * @param {string} mediaPath - The path to the media file.
 * @param {string} mediaId - The ID of the media item.
 * @returns {Promise<void>} A promise that resolves when the tags have been extracted and saved.

edges.name: getStorageConfig
edges.doc: * Gets storage config with safe fallback for tests or when ConfigService is not registered

edges.name: ensureCacheDir
edges.doc:
* Ensures that the thumbnail cache directory for a specific source exists.
 * If the directory does not exist, it will be created recursively.
 * @param {string} mediaSourceId - The ID of the media source.
 * @returns {Promise<void>} A promise that resolves when the directory is ensured.

edges.name: getThumbnailPath
edges.doc:
* Generates the full path for a thumbnail file given a media ID and source ID.
 * The thumbnail files are stored in WebP format.
 * @param {string} mediaSourceId - The ID of the media source.
 * @param {string} mediaId - The ID of the media item.
 * @returns {string} The absolute path to the thumbnail file.

edges.name: generateThumbnail
edges.doc:
* Generates a thumbnail for the specified media item.
 * The thumbnail is resized, converted to WebP format, and saved to the cache directory.
 * @param {Media} media - The media object from the database.
 * @param {string} sourcePath - The absolute path to the media source directory.
 * @returns {Promise<void>} A promise that resolves when the thumbnail has been generated.

edges.name: deleteThumbnail
edges.doc:
* Deletes a thumbnail file from the cache.
 * Errors are ignored if the file does not exist (ENOENT).
 * @param {string} mediaId - The ID of the media item whose thumbnail is to be deleted.
 * @returns {Promise<void>} A promise that resolves when the thumbnail has been deleted or not found.

edges.name: updateLogLevel
edges.doc:
* Updates the log level dynamically.
 * @param level - The new log level (trace, debug, info, warn, error, fatal)

edges.name: getDriver
edges.doc:
* Returns a driver instance for the specified media source.
 * @param {MediaSource} source - The media source object from the database.
 * @returns {MediaSourceDriver} An instance of a class implementing the MediaSourceDriver interface.
 * @throws {Error} If the media source type is unknown or connection information is invalid.

edges.name: LocalDriver
edges.doc:
* Implements the MediaSourceDriver interface for local file system access.
 * Manages media files stored in a local directory.

edges.name: S3Driver
edges.doc: * Provides functionalities for interacting with AWS S3 storage.

edges.name: SftpDriver
edges.doc: * Provides functionalities for interacting with SFTP storage.

edges.name: checkFfmpegAvailable
edges.doc: * Check if ffmpeg is available

edges.name: getFfmpeg
edges.doc:
* Get configured ffmpeg instance
 * The ffmpeg path is set on first call

edges.name: About
edges.doc:
* The About page component.
 * Displays information about the application and includes a counter component.
 * @returns {JSX.Element} The rendered About page.

edges.name: Home
edges.doc:
* The Home page component.
 * Displays a welcome message and includes a counter component.
 * @returns {JSX.Element} The rendered Home page.

edges.name: NotFound
edges.doc:
* A 404 Not Found page component.
 * Displays a message indicating the page was not found and provides links to the home and about pages.
 * @returns {JSX.Element} The rendered 404 page.

edges.name: mediaTypeSchema
edges.doc:
* Zod schema for validating media types.
 * Allowed values are "image", "video", and "audio".

edges.name: getMediaTypeFromExtension
edges.doc:
* Determines the media type based on the file extension.
 * @param fileName The name of the file
 * @returns 'video' | 'audio' | 'image'

edges.name: getContentTypeFromExtension
edges.doc:
* Determines the content type (MIME type) based on the file extension.
 * @param fileName The name of the file
 * @returns The MIME type string, defaulting to 'application/octet-stream'

edges.name: PathUtils
edges.doc: * Provides utility functions for manipulating file paths.

edges.name: SchemaValidator
edges.doc: * Provides utility functions for validating data against Zod schemas.

edges.name: TagExtractionOptions
edges.doc: * Options for tag extraction from ComfyUI workflow

edges.name: tagResponseSchema
edges.doc:
* Zod schema for tag API response (frontend)
 * Used for validating tag data returned from the API

edges.name: tagListResponseSchema
edges.doc: * Zod schema for tag list API response

edges.name: InputProps
edges.doc: * Props for the Input component, extending standard HTML input attributes.

edges.name: Input
edges.doc:
* A customizable input component that extends standard HTML input functionality.
 * It applies consistent styling and handles common input attributes.
 * @param {InputProps} props - The properties for the input component.
 * @returns {JSX.Element} The rendered input element.

edges.name: lifespan
edges.doc:
""
    Lifespan context manager to handle startup and shutdown events.
    We use this to warm up the models.
    ""
